Localization.Description: Sending an email to verify registration

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An error occurred while sending an email from host {src.host} to verify the registration of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
An email was sent from host {src.host} to verify the registration of user {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
